Interface ICurve3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define operations common to curves with Zs.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AC4D3DA2-4B76-48DD-B393-2468452CA30D")]
public interface ICurve3D

Properties

IsClosed3D

Indicates if 'from' and 'to' points (of each part) are identical.

bool IsClosed3D { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Length3D

The length of the curve.

double Length3D { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Methods

GetSubcurve3D(double, double, bool, out ICurve3D)

Extracts a portion of this curve into a new curve.

void GetSubcurve3D(double fromDistance, double toDistance, bool bAsRatio, out ICurve3D ppOutSubCurve)

Parameters

fromDistance double
toDistance double
bAsRatio bool
ppOutSubCurve ICurve3D
